recommendations.title: The Greasy Strangler
recommendations.overview: Ronnie runs a Disco walking tour with his son, Brayden. When a sexy woman takes the tour, it begins a competition between father and son for her love. It also signals the arrival of an oily strangler who stalks the streets at night.

recommendations.title: Everybody Dies But Me
recommendations.overview: One Monday morning Katya, Vika and Zhanna learn that there will be a school disco, their first disco, on the coming Saturday night. The girls feverishly start preparing for the event, which rapidly becomes the most important moment ever in their univ

recommendations.title: Even Lambs Have Teeth
recommendations.overview: Two young women terrorized by a group of small town psychos seek revenge on their tormentors.

recommendations.title: Hell Night
recommendations.overview: As an initiation rite into Alpha Sigma Rho fraternity, four pledges must spend a night in Garth Manor, twelve years to the day after the previous resident murdered his entire family.

recommendations.title: Baaria
recommendations.overview: In 1920s Bagheria, Giuseppe 'Peppino' Torrenuova works as a shepherd to financially help his poor family. Over the next fifty years, Giuseppe's life, as well as the life of the village, is observed. Giuseppe grows up, joins the Communist Party, marri

recommendations.title: Stay Out of the Attic
recommendations.overview: A diverse group of ex-cons-turned-movers are convinced by their creepy client, Vern Muller, to pull an all-nighter for a generous pay bump.  As the night progresses and rooms are cleared, they slowly uncover the horrors that exist inside his old Vict

recommendations.title: The Devil's Hand
recommendations.overview: Five young Amish girls accused of being Satan's children must fight for their lives when their devout community elders insist they be "cleansed" before turning 18.

recommendations.title: Queens on the Run
recommendations.overview: When four women finally take the road trip they planned in high school, they have no idea of the things they'll bump into... sometimes literally.

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.

recommendations.title: Emergency
recommendations.overview: Ready for a night of legendary partying, three college students must weigh the pros and cons of calling the police when faced with an unexpected situation.
